description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and an open-plan interior layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large glass windows and sliding doors providing ample natural light. The house features multiple rooms, including a spacious living area, kitchen, and several smaller rooms, likely bedrooms and bathrooms. There are visible indoor plants and contemporary furnishings, as well as a dartboard and bookshelves, suggesting a comfortable and stylish living environment. The windows are arranged in asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and others smaller and more regularly spaced. The main entryway is marked by a glass door, flanked by windows and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a clean, modern aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large glass windows, and a clean, open-plan layout. The exterior is mostly white with contemporary features and asymmetrical window placement.
description_view_0: This view shows the main living area, kitchen, and a dartboard on the wall, with large windows and a glass entry door visible.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the open-plan living space, indoor plants, and a rear glass door leading to a possible patio or garden area.
description_view_2: This side reveals more private rooms, likely bedrooms and bathrooms, with smaller windows and a less prominent entryway.
description_view_3: This perspective shows the kitchen, living area, and a side window, emphasizing the house's elongated layout and flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door with adjacent windows, minimal steps, and no porch or decorative columns, emphasizing a sleek, modern look.
